featureName: BUG-049-003 Twitter API alert metric name + runbook docs drift
title: Twitter API alert references wrong metric name + missing operator runbook entries
discoveredBy: sweep round 10 (stochastic-quality-sweep, harden trigger, harden-to-doc mapped mode, parent-expanded-child-mode)

parentWorkflow.findingLens: Spec 049 contract regression — alerts + docs drift introduced by spec 056

executionHistory.summary: Harden trigger ran ./smackerel.sh test unit --go --go-run 'TestMonitoring|...' and surfaced TestMonitoringAlertsContract_LiveFile + TestMonitoringDocsContract_LiveFile failures against spec 056 amendments to alerts.yml and docs/Operations.md.

Data-only fix: rename smackerel_connector_twitter_api_retries -> smackerel_connector_twitter_api_retries_total (3 occurrences) in alerts.yml; add 2 rows to docs/Operations.md Alert Runbook table. Existing contract tests serve as regression mechanism.
Single scope BUG-049-003-S1 with 10 DoD items + 8 test plan rows + SCN-049-B005/B006 scenarios.
